failure.message: One or more child tests had errors
One or more child tests had errors
One or more child tests had errors

SetUp : System.Reflection.TargetInvocationException : Exception has been thrown by the target of an invocation. ----> System.InvalidOperationException : The following game object is invoking the DontDestroyOnLoad method: GameManager. Notice that DontDestroyOnLoad can only be used in play mode and, as such, cannot be part of an editor script.
